title: Why Money Makes Predictions More Accurate | The Kalshi Story
summary: An EO Studio video examines how financial mechanisms, through the lens of Kalshi's prediction market platform, can improve the accuracy of forecasts. The content explores the relationship between monetary incentives and predictive performance.
